propositions: Raise the plan-review REVIEW_RESULT retention cap RETAIN_PER_TICKET from 10 to 50 per ticket.
Drift-refresh re-reviews can exceed 10 rounds, causing auditors to lose earlier review rounds under the current cap.
code_review/sidecar.py currently lacks a prune() function and RETAIN_PER_TICKET constant, so code-review REVIEW_RESULT events grow unbounded.
Add a prune path to code-review sidecar mirroring plan-review, governed by the SAME imported constant with no duplicated literal.
Call prune from code-review emit() after appending, matching plan-review's emit-then-prune sequence, best-effort and exception-swallowing.
After 50+ reviews on one ticket, exactly 50 newest sidecars are retained on both plan-review and code-review paths.
